title: Nachowr #5152
definition:
Nahor = "snorting"

 1) son of Serug, father of Terah, and grandfather of Abraham
 2) son of Terah and brother of Abraham
nasbUsage:
Definition: Nahor = "snorting"

 1) son of Serug, father of Terah, and grandfather of Abraham
 2) son of Terah and brother of Abraham

    NASB:  grandfather of Abraham, also the brother of Abraham
